name: dianping-jingyingbao-capture
description: Minimal local service for logging into Jingyingbao with Playwright and capturing overview data.

scripts.build:win: node scripts/inline-html.js && pkg src/app.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/win/经营宝助手.exe --public --no-bytecode --public-packages "*"
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/inline-html.js && pkg src/app.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output dist/mac/经营宝助手 --public --no-bytecode --public-packages "*"
scripts.build: npm run build:win && npm run build:mac
